name: Tomato Sauce Rita Taule (Btvc62a)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
3. Add Italian-style tomatoes to the blender, puree, and pour into the saucepan.
4. Add crushed tomatoes, Italian seasoning, bay leaf, salt, pepper, and sugar.
5. Bring mixture to a simmer, uncovered, and cook for 1 hour.
6. Stir in chopped parsley and basil; continue simmering for an additional 15 minutes.
7. If desired, add browned ground beef, meatballs, or sausage during the last few minutes of cooking.
8. For a thicker sauce, stir in a tablespoon (Tbsp) or two of tomato paste if preferred.
